$comment: On-device LLM (Gemma 3 1B via MediaPipe Tasks GenAI). The .task file is downloaded into context.filesDir/llm/ on user request and loaded once via LlmInference.createFromOptions. The default URL points at the LiteRT community Gemma 3 1B int4 mobile build on Hugging Face — requires the user to accept Google's Gemma license, which is why we don't auto-download. The setup UI prompts for consent and an optional HF token.
